title: leonurus galeobdolon
intro: Leonurus galeobdolon, also known as Wood Betony, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its hairy leaves and small blue flowers. The medicinal properties of Leonurus galeobdolon lie in its ability to calm the nervous system and act as an antispasmodic, making it a popular herbal remedy for anxiety, insomnia, and muscle spasms. The health benefits of Wood Betony include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. Leonurus galeobdolon can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
